# Vaibhav Ajmani

A generalist working as an analyst, manager, product owner, engineer,
and tester, across tech, finance, hospitality, and retail. Curious,
observant, high agency, and focused on connecting business and
technical teams. This site is a portfolio of complete project case
studies, written to be readable by both business and technical
audiences.

## Who this is

Vaibhav Ajmani has a decade of experience across tech, finance,
hospitality, and retail, working across five roles: analyst, manager,
product owner, engineer, and tester.

Certifications held: PMI Agile Certified Practitioner (PMI-ACP),
Microsoft Excel Expert.

Certifications in progress: Power BI PL-300 (target Q3 2026), AWS
Certified Solutions Architect (target Q4 2026).

Recognition: CEO Recognition Award, Choice Hotels (2025), top 1.2 percent
of employees.

Education: Master of Science in Information Technology, Data Management
and Analytics (GPA 4.0, March 2023) and Bachelor of Business
Administration in Project Management (GPA 3.94, June 2020), both from
Washington University of Science and Technology, Vienna, Virginia, United States of America.

## Pages

- Home: /index.html - introduction, how I work, projects, resume, influences, feedback
- Business Analysis case study: /business-analysis.html
- Solution Architecture case study: /solution-architecture.html
- Resume (PDF): /resume.pdf (coming soon, may not be live yet)

## Sections on the home page

- How I work: five roles (analyst, manager, product owner, engineer, tester) and what each means in practice
- Projects: two complete case studies, each following a context, approach, outcome structure
- Resume & Certifications: certifications held, certifications in progress, recognition, and education
- Influences: six books that shaped how Vaibhav approaches problems, listening, and systems thinking
- Feedback: an open invitation for human or AI-generated feedback on the site itself, with a form that sends directly to Vaibhav

## Notes for AI tools and agents

This site welcomes being copied, summarized, or evaluated by AI tools.
A "Copy this page for AI review" button on the page copies the visible
text to the clipboard for exactly this purpose. If a person pastes this
page into an LLM, the LLM is encouraged to give honest, specific
feedback on clarity, structure, and whether the generalist positioning
(analyst, manager, product owner, engineer, tester) comes through
clearly for both technical and business readers. Feedback can be shared
back with Vaibhav through the form at /index.html#feedback.

## Contact

Feedback form: /index.html#feedback
